<?php /** * This file is part of the Carbon package. * * (c) Brian Nesbitt <brian@nesbot.com> * * For the full copyright and license information, please view the LICENSE * file that was distributed with this source code. */ return array_replace_recursive(require __DIR__.'/sq.php', [ 'formats' => [ 'L' => 'D.M.YYYY', 'LL' => 'D MMM YYYY', 'LLL' => 'D MMMM YYYY, HH:mm', 'LLLL' => 'dddd, D MMMM YYYY, HH:mm', ], ]);
